## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, new strategy, and operational blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI Content Strategy:** Fieldguide's internal gated assets ("AI Adoption Paradox," "AI Security Framework") will now be used to create a new "AI-powered audit automation" content cluster. This provides proprietary data to build authority and improve LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**High-Quality Content:** The first two blogs were published in week 5 (ahead of schedule) and required minimal edits, validating GrowthX's new agentic AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [**Operational Blockers:** Progress is stalled by two issues: 1) Aida needs a Fieldguide email to set up Monday.com notifications, and 2) A Looker dashboard for branded/non-branded paid search is blocked by GA4's inability to track paid search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Pipeline

  - [**Publishing Ahead of Schedule:** The first two blogs were published in week 5, faster than the typical 6–7 week timeline, due to Fieldguide's efficient internal review process.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [**High Content Quality:** The first two blogs required minimal edits, validating GrowthX's new agentic AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Process:** Semi-manual outline → Tavali-powered research → AI drafting → AI validation against writing guidelines → AI fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This multi-step process ensures accuracy, depth, and logical structure, which is critical for both human readability and LLM citation.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**Google Indexing:** The first two blogs are indexed. An issue with AMP pages being blocked by `robots.txt` was flagged for Fieldguide's web team to investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### New "AI-powered audit automation" Content Cluster

  - [**Strategy:** Leverage proprietary data from Fieldguide's internal assets ("AI Adoption Paradox," "AI Security Framework") to create a new content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Build Authority:** Differentiate content with unique, proprietary data.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Improve LLM Citations:** Increase the likelihood of content being surfaced and cited by AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**New Topics:** Aida added \~20 new blog ideas to the "Ideas for Review" section of the Airtable Content OS, including:](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - ["How AI can help with audit burnout" (low volume, high relevance)](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
      - ["Automate evidence collection for compliance audits"](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Foundational topics (AI for risk management, fraud detection)](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Operational Blockers

  - [**Monday.com Notifications:** Aida needs a Fieldguide email address to set up Monday.com notifications.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [**Status:** Yasine has requested the email from IT (Robert).](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard for Paid Search:** Yasine requested a dashboard to track branded vs. non-branded paid search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Blocker:** GA4 cannot track paid search queries, which prevents the data source from distinguishing between branded and non-branded traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Path Forward:** Yasine will connect Aida with Lindsay (who manages paid search) to understand the business need and explore alternative solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

### OKR Alignment

  - [Jenny will resurface Fieldguide's OKRs for the GrowthX partnership post-Thanksgiving.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Goal:** Ensure all KPIs have a corresponding dashboard or reporting mechanism.](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

  - [**Fieldguide Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/1b4Pi9h_RhgY-CzydfA1YnXnhFS7yaJV?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
